gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用误拨的语音留言串起两个孤独灵魂，浪漫得令人心碎。
gems.whyWatchEn: A wrong-number voicemail sparks an unlikely long-distance romance, blending humor and heartbreak in a fresh, modern love story.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式温情与《你眼中的世界》般奇妙缘分的观众
gems.audienceEn: Fans of heartfelt rom-coms like Love Actually and unconventional connections like In Your Eyes.

gems.title: 火遮眼
gems.summary: 女儿在街头被拐走，店主（谢苗 饰）探寻一个复杂的犯罪网络，不择手段将女儿救回来。他唯一的盟友是一名记者（乔•塔斯利姆 饰）。这两个来自不同背景的人物必须学会相互信任、合作，运用自己不为人知的过去所赋予的格斗技能。
gems.summaryEn: After Wang Wei's daughter is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out to find her himself. His only ally is Navin, a relentless journalist whose wi
gems.whyWatch: 谢苗与乔·塔斯利姆联手，硬核打斗中藏着父爱的绝望与愤怒。
gems.whyWatchEn: A gritty action-thriller where a father’s desperate rescue mission meets bone-crunching fight choreography and an unlikely alliance.
gems.audience: 热爱《飓风营救》式硬汉父亲与《突袭》般实战格斗的观众
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy Taken-style parental vengeance and The Raid-level martial arts realism.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 当经典玩具遭遇数字时代，皮克斯用温情质问科技与童年的关系。
gems.whyWatchEn: Pixar takes the beloved franchise into the digital age, exploring how screen time challenges the soul of play with wit and heart.
gems.audience: 从小看《玩具总动员》长大的老粉，以及思考孩子与屏幕关系的家长
gems.audienceEn: Longtime Toy Story fans and parents reflecting on how screens reshape childhood imagination.
